name: v14_runtime_audit_report_only_v1
intent: Evaluate the current project state, make no modifications, and deliver a structured report on what is present, working, missing, uncertain, or inconsistent.
primary_goal: Inspect the current v14 project and verify which expected systems, functions, data flows, diagnostics, and tests are actually present and operational.

core_state: amplitude is derived from abs(signed_field) or equivalent derived relation
component_history exists or equivalent history tracking exists
orientation_layer: component-targeted operator application exists or equivalent masked/local application exists
peak_band_topology: wraparound lattice support exists if expected
signed_field_transition: signed_field is computationally primary or effectively primary
diffusion runs on signed_field or equivalent signed topology surface
polarity is derived from persistent signed structure
zero crossings are derived from persistent signed structure
corridor_layer: polarity and/or zero-crossing bias hooks exist
topology support field exists or equivalent topology-aware corridor modulation exists
zero-crossing penalty field exists or equivalent cancellation penalty exists
entry can require signed/topological support if enabled
component_layer: component masks or equivalent targeting support exist
component matching across phases exists or equivalent persistence logic exists
component targeting influences operator selection or projection
readout_and_artifacts: component information is persisted in artifacts if expected
caution information is persisted in artifacts if expected
tests_and_runtime: tests pass or current failing tests are listed clearly
basic smoke run is possible or current blocker is stated clearly
determinism evidence exists if test present
baseline-compatibility evidence exists if test present

required_actions.action: Inspect project structure and enumerate relevant files without changing anything.
Read each target module and map expected features to actual implementation.
Check whether names, data flow, and persistence behavior are consistent across modules.
Review config keys and confirm whether each expected runtime knob is actually consumed.
Review tests and determine which capabilities are directly verified.
Run read-only verification commands if safe, such as test execution or smoke-run inspection, but do not alter files.

read_only: run smoke test with existing configs
inspect generated output files if they already exist or are produced without modifying source

agent_behavior_rules: Do not change any project file under any circumstance.
Do not convert this into a patch task.
Base conclusions on actual inspected evidence.
If a feature is claimed in notes but not found in code, mark it as unverified or missing.
If a test passes but only partially proves a feature, say so clearly.
If smoke run is not possible, explain why without modifying the project.
success_condition: A complete JSON audit report is delivered, no files are modified, and the report clearly separates confirmed, partial, missing, and uncertain project capabilities.
